overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player navigating through dark industrial maintenance shafts, emerging onto high-rise building exteriors with panoramic city views, exploring the Japantown South district with neon signage and vending machines, and traversing elevated highway overpasses in a futuristic dystopian metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance shaft with water reservoir

events.description: passing Puerto Rican flag painted on wall with increasing light from opening ahead
brief glimpse of outdoor cityscape through metal grating before entering dark corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight industrial corridors and metal walkways above water

entered.detail: rusted metal walkways and platforms forming the shaft walls
pool of stagnant water at the bottom of the maintenance shaft
large flag painted on concrete wall with black star and red white stripes
large orange and silver ventilation pipes running vertically
single fluorescent light fixture illuminating the dark corridor

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a dark, enclosed industrial maintenance shaft with metal grating walkways above a water reservoir. A Puerto Rican flag is painted on the concrete wall as the camera moves toward a light source, briefly revealing the city outside before entering another dark corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise building exterior balcony with panoramic city views

events.description: exits dark building interior into bright sunlight on elevated exterior platform
panning right to view different angles of the futuristic cityscape and flying vehicles

agents.ego_description: moving along building exterior balcony, observing the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape

entered.detail: dense cluster of skyscrapers and megabuildings with various architectural styles
aerodyne vehicles flying between buildings in the distance
transparent safety barrier along the edge of the building platform
large structure with orange hexagonal patterning and ventilation systems

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark interior, the scene opens to a bright panoramic view of a futuristic cityscape. The player stands on a high-rise exterior balcony with glass railings, overlooking flying vehicles, massive skyscrapers, and industrial buildings under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: Japantown South commercial street with vending machines and neon advertisements

events.description: descending from rooftop vantage point to street level commercial district
arriving at Japantown South entrance with illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking through commercial street, observing vending machines and storefronts

notable_agents.action: standing near vending machines, facing away from camera

entered.detail: illuminated blue neon sign reading JAPANTOWN SOUTH above entrance
large vertical advertisement showing coffee cup with golden logo
pair of glowing blue arcade-style vending machines with game graphics
illuminated transit map showing rail lines and station connections

segments.scene_description: The player descends to street level in the Japantown South district, a commercial area with neon signage, vending machines, and large advertisements. The environment is sheltered by building overhangs with mixed artificial and natural lighting, featuring a subway map display and a pedestrian near the vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: building interior corridors and maintenance shafts with exterior billboard views

events.description: entering building interior from Japantown street level
passing window revealing bright exterior billboard before returning to darkness

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight concrete corridors and industrial maintenance areas

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls of the interior passageway
large advertisement with text WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH and red background image
white advertisement sign with pink heart and NIKOLA branding
large red LED sign with HYDRO text and circular logo

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark building interior with concrete corridors, briefly passing a window showing an exterior billboard reading WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH. The segment continues through narrow maintenance passages with views of the Nicola and Hydro advertisements before emerging.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overpass with commercial billboards and distant mountain views

events.description: exiting building to outdoor highway overpass with open sky
passing North Oak sign with view of highway traffic and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: traversing the elevated highway overpass, observing traffic and billboards

entered.detail: elevated multi-lane highway with concrete supports and railings
large white sign reading North Oak on hillside with trees
tall structure with multiple advertisement screens showing various brands
distant mountain range visible beyond the city buildings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an elevated highway overpass under bright sunlight, with views of the North Oak sign on a distant hillside, highway traffic below, and large digital billboards. The scene features open sky, distant mountains, and flying vehicles passing overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic depths of industrial maintenance shafts to the expansive, sun-drenched heights of a futuristic highway. It begins within a dark, enclosed corridor featuring metal grating and a painted Puerto Rican flag, moving toward a sliver of light that suddenly opens into a bright, panoramic balcony overlooking a cityscape of skyscrapers and flying vehicles. The perspective then descends into the neon-lit commercial bustle of the Japantown South district, weaving past vending machines and subway maps under sheltered building overhangs. As the camera passes through another series of narrow concrete passages and glimpses of towering billboards, the environment shifts once more, finally emerging onto an elevated highway overpass. The scene concludes under a clear blue sky with views of distant mountains, the North Oak hillside sign, and traffic flowing beneath massive digital displays.
